top_signals.title: Permira-Backed Womenswear Retailer Reformation Files for US IPO
top_signals.summary: Reformation Inc., a sustainable womenswear brand that’s backed by private equity firm Permira, filed for a US initial public offering, disclosing growing sales.

top_signals.title: Could Burnham be the answer to free-to-air sport for all?
top_signals.summary: With Andy Burnham set to be the next Prime Minister, Alan Sendorek assesses how his approach to broadcasting sport may differ from Sir Keir Starmer’s. Sir Keir Starmer – the country’s most powerful Arsenal fan – last month joined the Football Supporters Association in calling on TNT Sports to make the Champions League final available [...]
